title: Shadows of Paris
writer: Francis Carco, Frederick J. Jackson, André Picard
actors: Pola Negri, Charles de Rochefort, Huntley Gordon
plot: At the end of the war, Claire, queen of the Paris underground, finds herself in Paris high society. Believing that her apache lover, Fernand, has been killed in the war, Claire falls in love with Raoul, a French official. De Croy,...
